error_empty_data: Please fill out all required fields

error_account_exists: An account with this email already exists
leaveMessage: We've loved having you around. Logging out means we'll have to say goodbye — for now.If you decide to leave, know that we'll miss you and can't wait for your return
empty_library_message: Start translating words to build your personal vocabulary collection. Every word you translate brings you closer to fluency!

onboarding_1_message: Instantly translate and learn new words in any language you choose
onboarding_2_message: Save your translations into organized collections for easy review
onboarding_3_message: Track your progress, get insights, and learn smarter
onboarding_4_message: Begin your journey to master new languages with us

empty_favorites_message: Your favorite words will appear here
error_favorites_message: We couldn't load your favorites. Please check your connection and try again
analytics_error_messages: We couldn’t load your analysis right now. Don’t worry — your progress is safe!
empty_collection_title: No words in this collection yet

nothing_here_message: This space will fill up as you translate words. Keep going to see your progress!

no_reminders_message: Active reminders help your brain retain words faster through regular review
